[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''D'Nore''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], serving under [[Zozridor Slayke]] as an officer in the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Izable]]. He was later killed during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].
